Home»Lifestyle»Celeb News»International Celebs»Tom Cruise to close Paris Olympics with a daring stunt

Tom Cruise is set to make a dramatic impact on the 2024 Paris Olympics Closing Ceremony with a thrilling stunt.

Tom Cruise will make an unforgettable mark on the 2024 Paris Olympics Closing Ceremony.

He is preparing a high-octane finale that will blend thrilling spectacle with a heartfelt transition to the next host city, Los Angeles.

Tom Cruise, 62, will take centre stage at the Stade de France in Paris, according to theDaily Mail.

His stunt involves rappelling from the top of the stadium, landing gracefully on the field while holding the Olympic flag.

This daring descent will signal the end of Paris’s Olympic celebration and mark the beginning of preparations for the 2028 Games in Los Angeles.

Tom Cruise’s stunt doesn’t stop there.

After his live performance in Paris, a pre-recorded segment will showcase the star’s journey with the Olympic flag to viewers, according toPop Culture.

The clip, filmed earlier this year, shows Cruise flying from France to California aboard an airplane before skydiving onto the iconic Hollywood sign.

A source revealed, “It’s going to be a showstopper. Tom Cruise always performs incredible stunts, and this one is no exception.”

He wanted to make sure the transition from Paris to Los Angeles was both spectacular and memorable.”

They filmed part of the stunt in Los Angeles back in March.

People spotted Tom Cruise scaling the Hollywood sign and believed at the time that he was filming a commercial.

Flying drones captured the moment, but few realised that it was part of a grand Olympic-themed project.

Sources revealed that Cruise inspired the stunt with his desire to create a memorable bridge between the two Olympic Games.

He reportedly pitched the concept to the International Olympic Committee, eager to bring his unique flair to the event.

The short film, which will follow Tom Cruise’s live stunt, shows him handing the Olympic flag to a diverse group of athletes.

These athletes include a cyclist, skateboarder, and volleyball player, according toAthlon Sports.

This symbolic gesture highlights the unity and spirit of the Games, connecting athletes from various disciplines.

Los Angeles Mayor Karen Bass will be on hand to receive the flag from Paris MayorAnne Hidalgo. This will mark the official handover of the Olympic baton.

The 2028 Summer Olympics, chaired by Casey Wasserman, will be held from 14 July to 30 July in LA.

Tom Cruise ’s involvement in Olympic ceremonies is not a new phenomenon.

Two decades ago, Tom Cruise  participated in the global torch relay for the 2004 Athens Games, further cementing his connection to the Olympic spirit.

As the 2024 Paris Olympics draw to a close, all eyes will be on Cruise and his spectacular stunt.

The event promises to be a fitting conclusion to an extraordinary Games, blending Hollywood glamour with the grandeur of Olympic tradition.

“Tom is bringing something truly special to the table,” said an insider. “This will be a closing ceremony like no other, and it’s all thanks to Tom’s vision and enthusiasm.”

With the Closing Ceremony scheduled for 11 August, fans worldwide eagerly await to see how Cruise’s grand finale will unfold.

It’s clear that the actor’s commitment to delivering a breathtaking performance is set to make this Olympic closing an unforgettable moment in history.
